pr.title: refactor(evaluators): rename stub evaluator modules with _stub suffix
pr.body:
## Summary
- Renames `pagespeed.rs`, `parity.rs`, and `sitemaps.rs` under `crates/evaluators/src/` to `*_stub.rs` so the module list visibly flags them as stubs (slice C.8 from the gap-closure master design).
- Updates `pub mod` declarations and `phase1_evaluators()` registrations in `crates/evaluators/src/lib.rs`. Struct names (`PageSpeedEvaluator`, `ParityEvaluator`, `SitemapsEvaluator`) are unchanged.
- No behavior change: each module still emits only the `*All` filter as before.

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo test -p sf-evaluators` — 166 passed, 0 failed (includes renamed `parity_stub::tests::non_html_page_fires_nothing`).
- [x] `cargo fmt --check` — clean.
- [x] `cargo clippy -p sf-evaluators --all-targets -- -D warnings` — clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: sahiljani
